runners.formComment: Showed good improvement when second behind Montana Icon at this track last start over 450m (25.78). Has to be respected.

runners.formComment: Last start finished 2nd in a Grade 4/5 on April 8 over 435m at Sale behind Dr. Erica beaten half a length (24.59). Boxed on well to finish runner-up last time. Leading player.

runners.formComment: Backs up after winning comfortably by 4 lengths at Geelong (22.57) beating Bohdan in a Mix 6/7 H on April 7 six days ago. Likely to find this a lot tougher and he needs to find another gear.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin and raced wide.
Slow to begin; Raced wide entering home straight.

runners.formComment: Missed the frame latest (26.18) when sixth over 450m at this track in a Grade 5. Has three wins and four placings from eight starts from the draw. Can hit the frame with the right run.

runners.formComment: Could only manage fourth last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest at double-figure odds when second (22.14) over 390m at this track. Awkwardly drawn and looks safely held.

runners.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Bendigo over 425m in 23.88. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when sixth over 450m at this track at Grade 5 level. Looking to others this time.

formComments.title: TAB

runners.formComment: Flew the lids with a strong early split and led throughout to score an impressive win by 1.5 lengths over 450m at this track (25.69). Has a sharp 25.33 PB at this course and distance. Hard to beat.
